productName: BLAZE Gummy Rosin - Baja Blaze 1:1:1:1 CBC:CBG:CBD:THC 400mg
description: An artisan chef-inspired gummy made like a tiny gourmet dessert — tender, juicy, and finished with the kind of sweet-sour sparkle that keeps you reaching for the next piece. It blends CBC to round out the full-plant entourage effect, CBG to support daytime focus and clarity, and CBD to keep things calm and balanced in a 1:1:1 ratio. Expect a smooth hybrid edible experience — give it time to bloom before taking more.
